name: Sukrasanjibani Modak | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: Premature ejaculation, Loss of strength, Increases Sperm count quality, Aphrodisiac.
composition: Each 5 gm contains- Ipomoea paniculata- 0.43 gm Streblus asper- 60.47 mg Oryza sativa- 0.12 gm other Ingredients as needed.
pharmacology: Sukracell is a rejuvenating ayurvedic formula used to treat premature ejaculation. It enhances strength, improves Sperm count quality, and boosts overall vitality.Ipomoea paniculata (Vidari kand): It contains a variety of chemical compounds, Phenolic compounds Flavonoids improve testosterone levels, sperm count motility by protecting testicular tissue from damage. Alkaloids stimulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis, leading to enhance libido hormonal balance. -Sitosterol mimic testosterone, supporting sexual vigor performance. Tannins help in tissue strengthening, which can assist with erectile dysfunction treatment by improving blood flow. Salmalia malabarica (Shimul mul): Flavonoids protect testicular tissue from oxidative stress, supports sperm motility testosterone production. Tannins help vascular integrity erectile function. -Sitosterol mimic testosterone, promote libido sexual performance. Saponins increase testosterone levels stimulate sexual behavior. Lupeol reduce inflammation in reproductive organs, helping in overall sexual function. Coumarin glycosides improve blood flow to genital tissues, which supports erection arousal. Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha): It contains several bioactive compounds including Withanolides, Glycowithanolides, Alkaloids, Flavonoids, Saponins. It improves sexual arousal erection. It enhances sperm count motility. It enhances libido sexual performance.
dosage_amp;_administration: 5-10 gm 2 times daily or as per directed by the Registered Physicians.
contraindications: No report is available on contraindication. It may be happened in patients who are hypersensitive to any of its ingredients.
side_effects: No side effects were observed at prescribed doses.
pregnancy_amp;_lactation: This should not be used during pregnancy.
storage_conditions: Keep out of reach of children. Keep away from direct sunlight. Store in a cool and dry place.
